特别是对细节的捕捉，让我仿佛置身其中。
[雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767974775,"group_id":"7571683825047063576","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"作品风格多边，超爱读者","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6F3GHqeAjOcWWwVBZ+zsBWSpVt7XWuN6AaHGeYmTyGB","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/49d7c51661c94d9185508e16958da9ce~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710311&x-signature=rcrwB7NRKySFyz%2Fsv2rxNVMSAzU%3D","user_id":"1445199948560687","user_name":"杂儿铺"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1445199948560687","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7571683825047063576","book_info":{"abstract":"谁能想到，大胤最没存在感的边缘皇子萧彻，灵魂里装着个现代人？他本想在冷宫里当个安静的背景板，却在落雪天撞上个自带草原风的北狄质子。
 
慕容凛：送你袋火炭，别冻着。
萧彻（内心）：这质子看着凶，怎么比宫里人还实在？
 
后来萧彻坐上龙椅，指尖摸着冰凉的玉玺，总想起当年雪地里递炭的手。而阶下的慕容凛，眼刀能逼退朝臣，却总在他看过来时，悄悄红了耳尖。
 
“陛下，玉玺不能啃。”
“那你总盯着它看什么？”
“……臣在想，陛下用着顺手就好。”
 
白切黑帝王×腹黑忠犬质子，甜是雪夜暖炭、宫宴暗护的小心思，虐是家国立场、身份鸿沟的拧巴。从冷宫梅苑到金銮宝殿，这场始于意外的羁绊，早就缠得解不开——毕竟，能让陛下舍得把玉玺递过去“随便啃”的，全天下就这一个。
